name: ccxray
desc: X-ray vision for AI agent sessions — a transparent HTTP proxy and dashboard for Claude Code

name: superlog
desc: Open-source observability tool that uses AI agents to self-heal your software

name: moai-adk
desc: SPEC-First Agentic Development Kit for Claude Code — 24 AI agents + 52 skills with TDD/DDD quality gates, 16-language projects, 4-language docs. Go CLI, zero deps.

name: open-mercato
desc: AI-Engineering Foundation Framework built with AI and designed for AI. Hundreds of architectural and domain decisions (multi-tenancy, RBAC,  event flow, pricing, sales pipeline,CRM/ERP processes) are already made conventions and specs so agents (Cursor, Claude Code, Codex) arch. decisions without reinventing.  Ship production grade with AI Agents.

name: omnigent
desc: A meta-harness for all your AI agents.  Omnigent provides a common layer over Claude Code, Codex, Pi, and the agents you write yourself: swap or combine harnesses without rewriting, keep them in check with policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in real time on the same live session, from any device.

name: Agent-Reach
desc: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

name: mindfs
desc: Access your personal AI agents and workstation data anywhere, anytime through MindFS.

name: openagentskill
desc: Open discovery, audit, and recommendation infrastructure for AI agent skills.

name: vector-vein
desc: No-code AI workflow. Drag and drop workflow nodes and use your workflow with your AI agents.

name: Context-Engineering-for-Multi-Agent-Systems
desc: Save thousands of lines of code by building universal, domain-agnostic Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) through high-level semantic orchestration. This repository provides a production-ready blueprint for the Agentic Era, allowing you to replace rigid, hard-coded workflows with a dynamic transparent Context Engine that provides 100% transparency.
